---
name: Automation case
about: Request or document a Windows GUI automation scenario.
title: "[Case]: "
labels: automation
assignees: ""
---

## Target application

Name the Windows application or dialog. Prefer generic, public applications for
reproduction, such as Notepad, Calculator, File Explorer, or native dialogs.

## Goal

What should the agent accomplish?

## Stable identifiers

List known `automation_id`, `name`, `control_type`, or `class_name` values if
available.

## Expected verification

What post-condition should prove the action succeeded?

## Fallback needs

Is OCR or image fallback required? Explain why UI Automation is not enough.

## Safety/privacy check

Before submitting, remove private hostnames, IP addresses, account names,
emails, screenshots, traces, credentials, and customer/application data.
